function.message: Handled the next inbox item successfully. I processed exactly the 8 file paths listed in the inbox request, added finance-schema YAML frontmatter to each (invoice/bill fields plus ordered lines), preserved each original note body verbatim below frontmatter, and then deleted the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS files for entered lanes, used process-next-inbox-item + inbox-processing-v2-update workflows, used OCR + migrate workflows, and applied exact field shape from finance-record-frontmatter schema. Processed exactly explicit inbox-listed paths and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly listed 8 finance files for OCR. Each of those 8 files was read and updated with required schema fields (invoice: record_type, invoice_number, alias, issued_on, total_eur, counterparty, project, optional related_entity, lines; bill analog with bill_id/purchased_on) extracted from visible body tables, with line order and totals preserved. After completing all listed items, the inbox file was deleted per inbox workflow requirements.
completed_steps_laconic: write updated frontmatter to all 8 listed files
